text.title: Product Hunt Launch System Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Product Hunt Launch System.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS, 6-week runway, mailing list grew to 540, niche hunter secured.
example.trace: pre-list 540 → hunter 2400 followers → assets: 6 images + gif + 5 FAQ → launch Wed 12:01 AM PT → 47-min average response → finished #3 day → 1900 site visits, 220 signups
